_comment: Sprite animations — Silencer admin tool. References real game sprite banks used for visual effects.

animations.name: Plume (Explosion)
animations.description: Used by rockets and grenades on impact. PLUME object cycles these frames then self-destructs.

animations.name: HealMachine Animation
animations.description: HealMachine object animation. Bank 172 shared with explosion effects.

animations.name: SecretReturn Billboard
animations.description: Animated billboard shown when a secret is returned. Bank 152.

animations.name: Jetpack Flame Overlay
animations.description: Flame overlay drawn on player while jetpack is active. Bank 218.
